judgment.summary: Profitable, growing IT services firm with solid cash flow and a reasonable forward valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 3.3%; next earnings date is 2026-06-18.
positives: Forward P/E 11.85x — attractive relative to trailing P/E and analyst growth estimates.
Revenue growth 8.3% YoY — steady top-line expansion in a key sector.
Operating margin 13.8% and Profit margin 10.6% — healthy profitability.
Return on equity 24.8% — strong returns for shareholders.
Free cash flow $12.16B TTM — robust cash generation.
negatives: Earnings growth 4.0% YoY — lagging revenue growth.
PEG ratio 1.26 — suggests growth may be priced in.
Debt/Equity 25.47% — leverage is present but manageable given cash flow.

news.paragraph: Accenture plc (ACN) is being evaluated as a potentially affordable AI stock, according to recent headlines. While the article does not present new catalysts, it frames the company within the context of AI investment opportunities. The upcoming earnings report on June 18th will be key for traders to assess the company's performance and outlook in this evolving sector.

headlines.title: Is Accenture plc (ACN) Among the Best Affordable AI Stocks to Buy Right Now?
